message:
Fix packfile checksum, skip blob walks, clamp API limits, deduplicate inflate

- Verify packfile SHA-1 trailer on receive to detect corruption
- collectObjects: skip blob reads in BFS — blobs don't have children,
  so add them to result directly without fetching from R2
- Clamp log/file-log maxCount to 10000 to prevent API abuse
- readObject: delegate to decompressObject instead of duplicating
  the WASM-with-retry + node:zlib fallback logic
- Remove misleading "base64" comment in readFile API
